scripts.build:scrapers: npm run build -w packages/plugin-sdk && npm run build -w packages/scraper-cibc && npm run build -w packages/scraper-td-credit-card && npm run build -w packages/scraper-stub
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run -w packages/backend typecheck && npm run -w packages/frontend typecheck
scripts.lint:all: npm run -w packages/backend lint:eslint && npm run -w packages/frontend lint:eslint
scripts.test:all: npm run -w packages/backend test && npm run -w packages/frontend test
scripts.test:coverage:all: npm run -w packages/backend test:coverage && npm run -w packages/frontend test:coverage
